title: Point IK Sample
description: A single Tier 1 point-to-point IK benchmark sample: a target end-effector pose plus grouping metadata. Position unit: meter. Quaternion order: wxyz.

sample_id.description: Unique identifier for this sample within its difficulty group.

difficulty_group.description: Difficulty group this sample belongs to, per configs/benchmark_config.json.

target_position_m.description: Target end-effector position [x, y, z] in meters, world frame.

target_quaternion_wxyz.description: Target end-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z] (wxyz order), world frame.

seed.description: Random seed used to generate this sample.

reference_joint_configuration_rad.description: Optional reference joint configuration [q1..q7] in radians used to derive the target pose, if generated by forward kinematics.
